## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt lint test test-integration test-e2e security` all pass locally
- [ ] New/changed segments, themes, or icons are covered by tests
- [ ] Any new Nerd Font glyph was verified against
      [glyphnames.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/master/glyphnames.json),
      not guessed from memory
- [ ] README/mockup updated if the rendered output changed
